pending.caption: % Diff Orders
pending.formula: (COUNTD([CY Orders]) - COUNTD([PY Orders])) / COUNTD([PY Orders])

pending.caption: % Diff Customers
pending.formula: (COUNTD([CY Customers]) - COUNTD([PY Customers])) / COUNTD([PY Customers])

pending.caption: % Diff Quantity
pending.formula: (SUM([CY Quantity]) - SUM([PY Quantity])) / SUM([PY Quantity])

pending.caption: % Diff Profit
pending.formula: (SUM([CY Profit]) - SUM([PY Profit])) / SUM([CY Profit])

pending.caption: % Diff Sales per Customers
pending.formula: ([CY Sales per Customer] - [PY Sales per Customer]) / [PY Sales per Customer]

pending.caption: PY Customers
pending.formula:
IF YEAR([Order Date])= [Select Year]-1 THEN [Customer ID] 
END

pending.caption: CY Sales per Customer
pending.formula: SUM([CY Sales]) / COUNTD([CY Customers])

pending.caption: CY Quantity
pending.formula:
IF YEAR([Order Date]) = [Select Year] THEN [Quantity]
END

pending.caption: CY Profit
pending.formula:
IF YEAR([Order Date]) = [Select Year] THEN [Profit]
END

pending.caption: CY Customers
pending.formula:
IF YEAR([Order Date])= [Select Year] THEN [Customer ID] 
END

pending.caption: CY Orders
pending.formula:
IF YEAR([Order Date]) = [Select Year] THEN [Order ID]
END

pending.caption: PY Sales
pending.formula:
IF YEAR([Order Date]) = [Select Year]-1 THEN [Sales]
END

pending.caption: PY Sales per Customer
pending.formula: SUM([PY Sales]) / COUNTD([PY Customers])

pending.caption: Previous Year
pending.formula: [Select Year]-1

pending.caption: KPI CY Less PY
pending.formula:
IF SUM([CY Sales]) < SUM([PY Sales]) THEN '⬤'
ELSE ''
END

pending.caption: KPI Sales Avg
pending.formula:
IF SUM([CY Sales]) > WINDOW_AVG(SUM([CY Sales]))
THEN 'Above'
ELSE 'Below'
END

pending.caption: CY Sales
pending.formula:
IF YEAR([Order Date]) = [Select Year] THEN [Sales]
END

pending.caption: % Diff Sales
pending.formula: (SUM([CY Sales]) - SUM([PY Sales])) / SUM([PY Sales])

pending.caption: Min/Max Sales
pending.formula:
IF SUM([CY Sales]) = WINDOW_MAX(SUM([CY Sales]))
THEN SUM([CY Sales])
ELSEIF SUM([CY Sales]) = WINDOW_MIN(SUM([CY Sales]))
THEN SUM([CY Sales])
END

pending.caption: {SUM([CY Sales])}
pending.formula: {SUM([CY Sales])}

pending.caption: Nr of Orders per Customers
pending.formula: { FIXED [CY Customers]: COUNTD([CY Orders])}

pending.caption: KPI Profit Avg
pending.formula:
IF SUM([CY Profit]) > WINDOW_AVG(SUM([CY Profit]))
THEN 'Above'
ELSE 'Below'
END

pending.caption: Min/Max Sales Per Customers
pending.formula:
IF [CY Sales per Customer] = WINDOW_MAX([CY Sales per Customer])
THEN [CY Sales per Customer] 
ELSEIF [CY Sales per Customer] = WINDOW_MIN([CY Sales per Customer])
THEN [CY Sales per Customer]
END

pending.caption: Min/Max Customers
pending.formula:
IF COUNTD([CY Customers]) = WINDOW_MAX(COUNTD([CY Customers]))
THEN COUNTD([CY Customers])
ELSEIF COUNTD([CY Customers]) = WINDOW_MIN(COUNTD([CY Customers]))
THEN COUNTD([CY Customers])
END

pending.caption: Min/Max Quantity
pending.formula:
IF SUM([CY Quantity]) = WINDOW_MAX(SUM([CY Quantity]))
THEN SUM([CY Quantity])
ELSEIF SUM([CY Quantity]) = WINDOW_MIN(SUM([CY Quantity]))
THEN SUM([CY Quantity])
END

pending.caption: Min/Max Profit
pending.formula:
IF SUM([CY Profit]) = WINDOW_MAX(SUM([CY Profit]))
THEN SUM([CY Profit])
ELSEIF SUM([CY Profit]) = WINDOW_MIN(SUM([CY Profit]))
THEN SUM([CY Profit])
END

pending.caption: Min/Max Orders
pending.formula:
IF COUNTD([CY Orders]) = WINDOW_MAX(COUNTD([CY Orders]))
THEN COUNTD([CY Orders])
ELSEIF COUNTD([CY Orders]) = WINDOW_MIN(COUNTD([CY Orders]))
THEN COUNTD([CY Orders])
END

pending.caption: PY Quantity
pending.formula:
IF YEAR([Order Date]) = [Select Year]-1 THEN [Quantity]
END

pending.caption: PY Profit
pending.formula:
IF YEAR([Order Date]) = [Select Year]-1 THEN [Profit]
END

pending.caption: PY Orders
pending.formula:
IF YEAR([Order Date]) = [Select Year]-1 THEN [Order ID]
END
